actor.goal: to reconcile artifacts, receipts, hashes, and narrative lineage

story.iWant: to reconcile artifacts, receipts, hashes, and narrative lineage
story.soThat: the conveyor cannot pass path parity as truth parity

acceptanceCriteria.statement: Evidence Inspector / Truth Reconciler owns only: receipt validation, content mismatch disposition, truth reconciliation, pass/block judgment.
Evidence Inspector / Truth Reconciler must not own: silent repair, artifact invention, worker output mutation, shipping.
Every materialized output must be receipt-backed.
No invisible execution path is allowed.

forbiddenClaims: Evidence Inspector / Truth Reconciler owns silent repair
Evidence Inspector / Truth Reconciler owns artifact invention
Evidence Inspector / Truth Reconciler owns worker output mutation
Evidence Inspector / Truth Reconciler owns shipping
